name: Totenko Co., Ltd.
summary: Totenko Co., Ltd. operates restaurants and banquet halls in Japan. The company offers food and drinks for weddings and other events, as well as for season banquets. It operates 20 stores. The company was formerly known as Ueno Kanko Onsen Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Totenko Co., Ltd. in May 1961. Totenko Co., Ltd. was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
